hero.title: Con Son Tourism Experience
hero.subtitle: Living with the river life – Real experience, real value.

mission.label: About us
mission.title: Mission to Preserve Western Soul
mission.text: We don’t just do tourism. We build a community ecosystem where every visitor contributes directly to orchard conservation, restoration of traditional craft villages, and improving local livelihoods.

green_tourism.title: Green Tourism
green_tourism.desc: Minimize plastic waste and prioritize natural materials in every experience.

community_support.title: Community Support
community_support.desc: 100% of guides are locals, bringing the most authentic stories from their own hometown.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.desc: Earn points, complete missions, and explore Con Son in an interesting, interactive, and meaningful way.

experiences.label: Activities
experiences.title: Interactive Experiences
experiences.subtitle: Touch the culture through your hands and feel the local taste through practical activities.

culinary.title: Make Traditional Cakes
culinary.desc: Knead dough, mold cakes, and steam fragrant traditional cakes according to hundred-year-old recipes.

art.title: Artistic Conical Hat Painting
art.desc: Create landscape motifs of Con Son on white conical hats, creating a unique souvenir with a personal touch.

community.title: Sales Experience
community.desc: Stand at a mixed rice paper stall with locals, feeling the simple and authentic rhythm of Con Son life.

explore.title: Discovery Journey
explore.desc: Move and explore all of Con Son by accumulating at least 2000m, experiencing every corner of the green island.

folk_art.title: Don Ca Tai Tu
folk_art.desc: Enjoy the heritage music space filled with the love for the land and people of the South through rustic melodies.

impact.label: Impact
impact.title: Sustainable Impact
impact.text: Every step you take leaves positive values. We transparency stabilize environmental efforts through actual numbers.
impact.goal_mission: Visitors participate in at least one mission
impact.goal_green: Visitors participate in at least one green behavior
impact.goal_journey: Participants complete at least one experience journey

step1.title: Register account
step1.desc: Create a free account and start your Con Son exploration journey.

step2.title: Get missions
step2.desc: Select culinary, art, and community missions and complete them at the destination.

step3.title: Earn Points & Rewards
step3.desc: Complete missions, accumulate points, and bring home unforgettable memories.

cta_section.title: Ready to immerse yourself in nature?
cta_section.subtitle: Register now to get a free Con Son travel handbook and start the green gamification journey.
cta_section.success: Thank you! We'll reach out soon.

footer.desc: Community-based experiential travel application, pioneering the sustainable tourism model and cultural identity preservation in Southwestern Vietnam.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Go Quest. Developed for the local community.

hero.title: Your Journey
hero.subtitle: Track progress and complete unique experience missions at Con Son to receive attractive rewards.
